{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323162013453DC1D76AAC41F2F2DE"}"},"total":198},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7332805666333672217","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错，是扶贫系统，新颖。而且作者的文笔很不错，当年高考就想写这样的文章，作者对于环境的描写和形容特别美，女主心理上的转变也很自然，已经是合格的巫了，加油大大，我超看好你"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707303836,"group_id":"7296379474143087650","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我的书架只放爽文","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5/vHxA2t5IyvcjQG19DwQI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d34186e649344ad989d8a45d7c7579e9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792807&x-signature=KxE0ssk3HIQXDte3Eoxeg8wfPoI%3D","user_id":"185145415438712","user_name":"清水沙糖桔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"185145415438712","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296379474143087650","book_info":{"abstract":"【无CP】【慢热】【成长型】【救世】

异世玄幻部落文，非原始母系社会，一切以巫为主导。
姜宁胎穿到天狼部落，这个世界不止有巫，还有战士和战宠。
部落外面更是凶兽遍地，危险重重，人人与凶兽争食，活的艰难又残酷。
一筹莫展之际天降扶贫系统，姜宁带着部落种田、养殖、搞基建，传承技艺，教授文字，建立部落联盟，一步步发展壮大。
文明之光不熄，人族永存一线生机。


金手指主要是科普+百度的功能，因为主角本身只是一个普通人，有很多技能都需学习。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ofa48465d6f356f5d6651768ca228f838~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"啊啊啊阿唐","author_id":"","book_id":"7296379474143087650","book_name":"我在原始部落搞扶贫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1408人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":72,"name":"兽世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=72&name=兽世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":876,"name":"胎穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=876&name=胎穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7296379479004938767","read_count":"1408","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1054090"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"513","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,兽世,无CP,异世穿越,基建,胎穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/45d44498b76eb93dce9ffb4593a197f1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438013&x-signature=xN3UOmJhynraBgYKSgoxxtESVfo%3D
